race.description: Horsepower Showcase Skellatar Sprint Prelude Handicap
race.comment: Tough race with plenty of different form angles. PLAY MY SONG (6) holding her form on the provincial circuit and doesn't have to improve much to win this with Small's claim. Has a good record at this track and will prove hard to hold out. DUROVA (2) lightly raced mare with a good winning record. Resumes after failing to match it with Sunrise when sixth over 1000m at Randwick in BM84 class last November. Good fresh performer who will stalk the speed. Respect. RITZSUN (9) back from a lengthy break and his best form is usually early in the campaign. Capable on his day and returns with the good trial placing over 900m at Scone. Each way. SARATOGA POWER (3) talented sprinter resuming. Ran on late when third in a small field over 1000m at Eagle Farm in a BM78 last December. Readied for this with the one trial and the tongue-tie goes on. CUMBOOGLE (5) drops in weight and brings the right figures to play a leading role. Each way.
